name: breadcrumb
description: Breadcrumb navigation block with separator and truncation.

props.name: items
props.description: Ordered list of breadcrumb items. The last item is treated as the current page (non-pressable, primary colour). Each item accepts an optional `testID` forwarded to its Pressable.

props.name: separator
props.description: Custom separator element rendered between items. Defaults to a '/' text character.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Style applied to the outer container row.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<Breadcrumb
  items={[
    { label: 'Home',     onPress: () => router.push('/') },
    { label: 'Settings', onPress: () => router.push('/settings') },
    { label: 'Profile' },
  ]}
/>
